TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: David Andersen hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska' / pkaki' kkska'. kawas te 1980, byacing te 1 ru 23 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Melbourne, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 211 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 113 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 2002 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Atlanta Hawks. qnxan na sraral David Andersen htgan beh Melbourne.yaba nya ga Danny yaya nya ga Mary.maki sa Langkestun pqwasan laqi cikuy ga t'aring mzuy Tara na mari. 11 kawas ga, Andersen tmwang qalang nqu pinsqunan na Tara mari Frankston Blues ,maki sa te qutux kawas nqu pinshloyan nha ga,maki sa mszit nqu mopuw sazing kawas ga lmaqux qu pinsqunan nha inlungan ru magal te qutux lalu. Andersen ga pkekaq mrkes nqu linhoyan mari tara si tehuk sa mopuw magal kawas maki Frankston Blues . ru tmwang sangka Frankston Blues na mlikuy . pincyuwagan nya' Australia ru Italy(1998‚Äď2004) 1998-2004 kawas,masoq krahu' pqwasan biru maki Australia. Andersen ru Australia msqun ÁįĹŤ®ā sazing kawas 1998-1999 kawas pspung,hiya mzyu mari 25 Ś†ī pspung. 1999 kawas ru Italian LBA na Kinder Bologna ÁįĹŤ®ā qutux kawas ŚźąÁīĄ. 2006 kawas 6 byacing 26 ryax, Andersen maki 2002 kawas magal NBA na Atlanta Hawks . 2002-2003 kawas, musa Kinder Bologna ,maki qani te qutux magal LBA pspung. 2003 kawas, Andersen ťõĘťĖč Bologna,suruw lga,Montepaschi Siena ÁįĹÁīĄ maki 2003-2004 kawas pupung.hiya magal te qutux ru magal LBA MVP qsabu. hiya tmwang msqun pspung EuroLeague payat. Russia (2004-2008) 2004 kawas, Andersen ru trang CSKA Moscow sazing kawas biru .te qutux pspung maki CSKA,magal msqun Russia pspung ru Russia koka te qutux.ru 2005 kawas tmwang te payat EuroLeague. Andersen 2003-2004 kawas tmwang EuroLeague pspung uzi. 2005-2006 kawas taring pspung,hiya ga nbu la. 2006 kawas, EuroLeague payat pspung.Andersen ru CSKA Moscow ÁļĆÁīĄ,suruw lga,ŚĻęŚä© hiya magal 2007 ru 2008 kawas blaq balay te qutux ru 2008 kawas, msqun pspung maki EuroLeague. NBA (2009-2011) 2009 kawas 7 byacing 14ryax, Atlanta Hawks Andersen šļ§śėď Houston Rockets pzyuw pila ru pspung. 2009 kawas 8 byacing 11 ryax,Andersen ru Houston Rockets ÁįĹŤ®ā cingay kawas biru . Italy 2011 kawas 6 byacing 28 ryax, Andersen ru Montepaschi Siena ÁįĹŤ®ā cyugal kawas ŚźąŚźĆ. 2011 kawas 12 byacing 19 ryax,NBA mhngaw lga,hiya ga ŤĘęŤß£ŚÉĪ New Orleans Hornets. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *a*i* an*ers~…ēen ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, qutux s~…ēa pzjaŇč pkaki Ē taj ks~…ēka Ē / pkaki Ē kks~…ēka Ē. kawas~…ē te ****, ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč te * ru ** rjax qu ńßint…£an nja, kinńßulan nja …£a melő≤ourne, ńßija …£a mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~…ēquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunő≤un kinwa…£iq nja, *** kunkin kin Ēs~…ēuw nja, ńßija …£a qutux nqu s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq na ppzuj pkekaq mrkes~…ē nqu linńßojan mari tara s~…ēi teńßuk s~…ēa mopuw ma…£al kawas~…ē maki *ranks~…ēton ő≤lues~…ē . ru tmwaŇč s~…ēaŇčka *ranks~…ēton ő≤lues~…ē na mlikuj . pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē aus~…ētralia ru italj(*********) ****-**** kawas~…ē,mas~…ēoq krańßu Ē pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru maki aus~…ētralia. an*ers~…ēen ru aus~…ētralia ms~…ēqun ** s~…ēaziŇč kawas~…ē ****-**** kawas~…ē ps~…ēpuŇč,ńßija pupuŇč.ńßija ma…£al te qutux ru ma…£al lő≤a m*p qs~…ēaő≤u. ńßija tmwaŇč ms~…ēqun ps~…ēpuŇč eurolea…£ue pajat. rus~…ēs~…ēia (****-****) **** kawas~…ē, an*ers~…ēen ru traŇč ¶~ ®s~…ēka mos~…ē ¶~ ®ow kawas~…ē tmwaŇč eurolea…£ue ps~…ēpuŇč uzi. ****-**** kawas~…ē tariŇč ps~…ēpuŇč,ńßija …£a nő≤u la. **** kawas~…ē, eurolea…£ue pajat ps~…ēpuŇč.an*ers~…ēen ru ¶~ ®s~…ēka mos~…ē ¶~ ®ow **,s~…ēuruw l…£a,** ńßija ma…£al **** ru **** kawas~…ē ő≤laq ő≤alaj te qutux ru **** kawas~…ē, ms~…ēqun ps~…ēpuŇč maki eurolea…£ue. nő≤a (****-****) **** kawas~…ē * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč **rjax, atlanta ńßawks~…ē an*ers~…ēen ** ńßous~…ēton ro ¶~ ®kets~…ē pzjuw pila ru ps~…ēpuŇč. **** kawas~…ē * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ** rjax,an*ers~…ēen ru ńßous~…ēton ro ¶~ ®kets~…ē ** ¶~ ®iŇčaj kawas~…ē ő≤iru . italj **** kawas~…ē * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ** rjax, an*ers~…ēen ru montepas~…ē ¶~ ®ńßi s~…ēiena ** ¶~ ®ju…£al kawas~…ē **. **** kawas~…ē ** ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ** rjax,nő≤a mńßŇčaw l…£a,ńßija …£a *** new orleans~…ē ńßornets~…ē. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: David Andersen hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska' / pkaki' kkska'. kawas te 1980, byacing te 1 ru 23 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Melbourne, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 211 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 113 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 2002 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Atlanta Hawks. qnxan na sraral David Andersen htgan beh Melbourne.yaba nya ga Danny yaya nya ga Mary.maki sa Langkestun pqwasan laqi cikuy ga t'aring mzuy Tara na mari. 11 kawas ga, Andersen tmwang qalang nqu pinsqunan na Tara mari Frankston Blues ,maki sa te qutux kawas nqu pinshloyan nha ga,maki sa mszit nqu mopuw sazing kawas ga lmaqux qu pinsqunan nha inlungan ru magal te qutux lalu. Andersen ga pkekaq mrkes nqu linhoyan mari tara si tehuk sa mopuw magal kawas maki Frankston Blues . ru tmwang sangka Frankston Blues na mlikuy . pincyuwagan nya' Australia ru Italy(1998‚Äď2004) 1998-2004 kawas,masoq krahu' pqwasan biru maki Australia. Andersen ru Australia msqun ÁįĹŤ®ā sazing kawas 1998-1999 kawas pspung,hiya mzyu mari 25 Ś†ī pspung. 1999 kawas ru Italian LBA na Kinder Bologna ÁįĹŤ®ā qutux kawas ŚźąÁīĄ. 2006 kawas 6 byacing 26 ryax, Andersen maki 2002 kawas magal NBA na Atlanta Hawks . 2002-2003 kawas, musa Kinder Bologna ,maki qani te qutux magal LBA pspung. 2003 kawas, Andersen ťõĘťĖč Bologna,suruw lga,Montepaschi Siena ÁįĹÁīĄ maki 2003-2004 kawas pupung.hiya magal te qutux ru magal LBA MVP qsabu. hiya tmwang msqun pspung EuroLeague payat. Russia (2004-2008) 2004 kawas, Andersen ru trang CSKA Moscow sazing kawas biru .te qutux pspung maki CSKA,magal msqun Russia pspung ru Russia koka te qutux.ru 2005 kawas tmwang te payat EuroLeague. Andersen 2003-2004 kawas tmwang EuroLeague pspung uzi. 2005-2006 kawas taring pspung,hiya ga nbu la. 2006 kawas, EuroLeague payat pspung.Andersen ru CSKA Moscow ÁļĆÁīĄ,suruw lga,ŚĻęŚä© hiya magal 2007 ru 2008 kawas blaq balay te qutux ru 2008 kawas, msqun pspung maki EuroLeague. NBA (2009-2011) 2009 kawas 7 byacing 14ryax, Atlanta Hawks Andersen šļ§śėď Houston Rockets pzyuw pila ru pspung. 2009 kawas 8 byacing 11 ryax,Andersen ru Houston Rockets ÁįĹŤ®ā cingay kawas biru . Italy 2011 kawas 6 byacing 28 ryax, Andersen ru Montepaschi Siena ÁįĹŤ®ā cyugal kawas ŚźąŚźĆ. 2011 kawas 12 byacing 19 ryax,NBA mhngaw lga,hiya ga ŤĘęŤß£ŚÉĪ New Orleans Hornets. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
